name: Minecraft (CurseForge Modpack)
author: quetzal
description: Minecraft Java modpack server from CurseForge, powered by the itzg/minecraft-server image in AUTO_CURSEFORGE mode. The modpack (and its mod loader: Forge/Fabric/NeoForge) is downloaded and installed by the image at first boot from the modpack URL — no manual upload. Requires a free CurseForge API key. Give the server plenty of memory: most packs want the pod memory limit set well above the JVM heap below.

variables.name: JVM Heap
variables.description: JVM heap size given to the server, e.g. 6G. Keep it below the pod memory limit (the JVM and the OS need headroom on top of this).

variables.name: Server Type
variables.description: Fixed: AUTO_CURSEFORGE installs the modpack from CurseForge.

variables.name: CurseForge API Key
variables.description: Personal CurseForge Eternal API key (create one at console.curseforge.com). Stored encrypted in a Kubernetes Secret.

variables.name: Modpack URL
variables.description: URL of the CurseForge modpack page (e.g. https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/all-the-mods-10) or of a specific pack file. The latest server file is resolved automatically.

variables.name: Pin file (optional)
variables.description: Optional substring to pin a specific server file/version, e.g. a version number. Leave blank to always use the latest server file from the URL.

variables.name: Exclude mods (optional)
variables.description: Optional comma-separated list of client-only mod slugs/filenames to remove from the server (some packs ship client mods that crash a dedicated server).

variables.name: RCON Password
variables.description: Password for RCON (stored encrypted, kept in a Kubernetes Secret). Optional — the panel console uses stdin, not RCON.
